<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1, viewport-fit=cover">
<title>Çınar Cafe & Restoran | Dijital Menü</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..144,400;0,9..144,500;0,9..144,600;0,9..144,700;1,9..144,500&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Tajawal:wght@400;500;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --bg:#FBF6EC;
    --bg-wide:#F1E7D2;
    --panel:#FFFFFF;
    --panel-soft:#F5EAD4;
    --ink:#2E2419;
    --ink-dim:#8A7A62;
    --copper:#B8763C;
    --copper-deep:#8C5A2A;
    --ember:#D69A5C;
    --sage:#6E7F55;
    --sage-deep:#4E5D3C;
    --line: rgba(184,118,60,0.20);
    --shadow: 0 18px 38px rgba(70,52,24,0.14);
    --radius-lg: 22px;
    --radius-md: 14px;
    --maxw: 560px;
  }

  *{box-sizing:border-box;}
  html,body{margin:0;padding:0;}
  body{
    background:var(--bg);
    color:var(--ink);
    font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
    overflow-x:hidden;
  }
  html.lang-ar body,
  html.lang-ar .hero-title,
  html.lang-ar .brand-mark,
  html.lang-ar h1, html.lang-ar h2, html.lang-ar h3,
  html.lang-ar .item-name, html.lang-ar .hero-tag,
  html.lang-ar .next-strip b, html.lang-ar .lang-current span,
  html.lang-ar .lang-menu button{
    font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;
  }

  #stage{
    max-width:var(--maxw);
    margin:0 auto;
    min-height:100vh;
    background:var(--bg);
    position:relative;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  @media (min-width:700px){
    body{
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% -10%, rgba(184,118,60,0.10), transparent 60%),
        var(--bg-wide);
      padding:32px 0;
    }
    #stage{ border-radius:28px; }
  }

  a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none;}
  button{font-family:inherit;}
  ::selection{background:var(--copper);color:#fff;}
  :focus-visible{ outline:2px solid var(--copper-deep); outline-offset:3px; border-radius:6px; }

  .eyebrow{
    font-size:11px; letter-spacing:0.22em; text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--copper-deep); font-weight:600;
  }
  .leaf-icon{ width:1em; height:1em; display:inline-block; vertical-align:-0.15em; }

  .icon-btn{
    width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:50%;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.88);
    border:1px solid rgba(184,118,60,0.30);
    backdrop-filter:blur(6px);
    color:var(--ink);
    cursor:pointer;
    transition:transform .25s ease, background .25s ease, border-color .25s ease, color .25s ease;
  }
  .icon-btn:hover{ background:var(--copper); border-color:var(--copper); transform:translateY(-2px); color:#fff;}
  .icon-btn svg{width:19px;height:19px;}

  /* ---------- top bar (home only) ---------- */
  .top-bar{
    position:absolute; top:18px; inset-inline:18px;
    display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start;
    z-index:5;
  }
  .top-bar-right{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:9px; }
  .brand-mark{
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
    font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-weight:600; font-size:15px;
    color:#fff; letter-spacing:0.02em;
    text-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.45);
    padding-top:11px;
  }
  .brand-mark .leaf-icon{ color:var(--ember); width:18px;height:18px;}

  /* ---------- language switch ---------- */
  .lang-switch{ position:relative; }
  .lang-current{
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.88); border:1px solid rgba(184,118,60,0.30);
    border-radius:999px; padding:9px 13px; backdrop-filter:blur(6px);
    color:var(--ink); font-size:12px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.04em;
    cursor:pointer; box-shadow:0 6px 14px rgba(70,52,24,0.10);
  }
  .lang-current svg{ width:11px;height:11px; transition:transform .25s ease; color:var(--copper-deep); }
  .lang-switch.open .lang-current svg{ transform:rotate(180deg); }
  .lang-menu{
    position:absolute; top:calc(100% + 8px); inset-inline-end:0;
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:14px; box-shadow:0 16px 34px rgba(70,52,24,0.22);
    padding:6px; min-width:152px;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:2px;
    opacity:0; transform:translateY(-6px); pointer-events:none;
    transition:opacity .2s ease, transform .2s ease;
    z-index:20;
  }
  .lang-switch.open .lang-menu{ opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); pointer-events:auto; }
  .lang-menu button{
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:10px;
    border:none; background:transparent; color:var(--ink);
    font-size:13px; font-weight:500; text-align:start;
    padding:9px 10px; border-radius:9px; cursor:pointer;
  }
  .lang-menu button:hover{ background:var(--panel-soft); }
  .lang-menu button.active{ color:var(--copper-deep); font-weight:700; }
  .lang-menu button.active::after{ content:"●"; font-size:7px; color:var(--copper); }

  /* ============ HOME VIEW ============ */
  #view-home{ position:relative; }

  .hero{
    position:relative;
    height:60vh; min-height:380px; max-height:540px;
    background-size:cover; background-position:center;
  }
  .hero::after{
    content:"";
    position:absolute; inset:0;
    background:
      linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(38,29,18,0.30) 0%, rgba(38,29,18,0.18) 36%, rgba(38,29,18,0.62) 78%, var(--bg) 100%);
  }
  .hero-watermark{
    position:absolute; left:50%; top:36%; transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
    width:220px; height:220px; opacity:0.18; color:#fff; z-index:1;
  }
  .hero-content{
    position:absolute; left:0; right:0; bottom:74px; z-index:2;
    text-align:center; padding:0 24px;
  }
  .hero-title{
    font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-weight:700;
    font-size:clamp(40px,11vw,56px); letter-spacing:0.06em;
    color:#fff; text-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.45); margin:0;
  }
  .hero-sub{
    font-size:11px; letter-spacing:0.32em; text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--ember); font-weight:700; margin-top:6px;
  }
  .hero-tag{
    font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-style:italic; font-weight:500;
    font-size:14px; color:#F3E7D2; margin-top:12px;
  }
  html.lang-ar .hero-tag{ font-style:normal; }

  .action-row{
    position:relative; z-index:3;
    display:flex; gap:14px; justify-content:center; margin-top:-30px;
  }

  .section-head{ padding:34px 22px 6px; text-align:center; }
  .section-head h2{ font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-weight:600; font-size:23px; margin:8px 0 0; color:var(--ink); }
  .divider-leaf{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; justify-content:center; margin:10px auto 0; color:var(--copper-deep); width:140px; }
  .divider-leaf .line{ flex:1; height:1px; background:var(--line); }

  .cat-grid{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:14px; padding:22px 22px 0; }
  .cat-card{
    position:relative; height:168px; border-radius:var(--radius-md);
    overflow:hidden; cursor:pointer; background-size:cover; background-position:center;
    border:1px solid var(--line); transition:transform .3s ease, box-shadow .3s ease;
  }
  .cat-card:hover{ transform:translateY(-4px); box-shadow:0 14px 26px rgba(70,52,24,0.28); }
  .cat-card::after{
    content:""; position:absolute; inset:0;
    background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(38,29,18,0.04) 28%, rgba(38,29,18,0.90) 100%);
  }
  .cat-card-body{ position:absolute; inset-inline:0; bottom:0; z-index:2; padding:13px 14px; }
  .cat-card .leaf-icon{ width:16px;height:16px; color:var(--ember); margin-bottom:6px; }
  .cat-card h3{ font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-weight:600; font-size:15.5px; margin:0; color:#fff; line-height:1.2; }
  .cat-card span{ display:block; margin-top:3px; font-size:10.5px; letter-spacing:0.05em; color:#E8DCC6; }

  .home-footer{ text-align:center; padding:18px 22px 38px; color:var(--ink-dim); font-size:11px; letter-spacing:0.08em; }
  .home-footer .leaf-icon{ width:13px;height:13px; color:var(--sage); margin:0 6px -2px; cursor:pointer; }

  /* ============ CATEGORY VIEW ============ */
  #view-category{
    position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:30;
    max-width:var(--maxw); margin:0 auto;
    background:var(--bg);
    display:flex; flex-direction:column;
    transform:translateX(100%);
    transition:transform .42s cubic-bezier(.65,0,.2,1);
  }
  #view-category.open{ transform:translateX(0); }
  #view-category.slide-left{ transform:translateX(-100%); }

  .cat-header{ position:relative; padding:54px 18px 22px; background-size:cover; background-position:center; flex:none; }
  .cat-header::after{
    content:""; position:absolute; inset:0;
    background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(38,29,18,0.42) 0%, rgba(38,29,18,0.62) 55%, var(--bg) 100%);
  }
  .cat-header-row{ position:relative; z-index:2; display:flex; align-items:center; }
  .back-btn{
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:7px;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.88); border:1px solid rgba(184,118,60,0.30);
    border-radius:999px; padding:8px 14px 8px 10px; cursor:pointer;
    color:var(--ink); font-size:12px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.03em;
    backdrop-filter:blur(6px);
    transition:background .25s ease, color .25s ease;
  }
  html.lang-ar .back-btn{ padding:8px 10px 8px 14px; }
  .back-btn:hover{ background:var(--copper); color:#fff; }
  .back-btn svg{ width:15px;height:15px; }
  html.lang-ar .back-btn svg{ transform:scaleX(-1); }

  .cat-title-wrap{ position:relative; z-index:2; margin-top:26px; }
  .cat-title-wrap .eyebrow{ display:block; color:var(--ember); }
  .cat-title-wrap h1{ font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-weight:700; font-size:30px; margin:6px 0 0; color:#fff; }
  .cat-count{ font-size:12px; color:#E8DCC6; margin-top:4px; }

  .cat-body{ flex:1; overflow-y:auto; -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch; padding:14px 18px 110px; }

  .item-row{ display:flex; gap:12px; padding:14px 2px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line); }
  .item-row:last-child{ border-bottom:none; }
  .item-thumb{
    flex:none; width:60px; height:60px; border-radius:13px; overflow:hidden;
    background:var(--panel-soft); border:1px solid var(--line);
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
  }
  .item-thumb img{ width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; display:block; }
  .item-thumb svg{ width:22px; height:22px; color:var(--copper-deep); opacity:0.5; }
  .item-content{ flex:1; min-width:0; }
  .item-top{ display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:8px; }
  .item-name{ font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-weight:500; font-size:16px; color:var(--ink); flex:none; }
  .item-trans{ display:block; font-size:11px; font-style:italic; color:var(--ink-dim); margin-top:2px; }
  html.lang-ar .item-trans{ font-style:normal; }
  .item-leader{ flex:1; border-bottom:1px dotted rgba(46,36,25,0.25); transform:translateY(-4px); }
  .item-price{ font-size:13px; color:var(--copper-deep); font-weight:700; flex:none; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; white-space:nowrap; }
  .item-desc{ margin:6px 0 0; font-size:12.5px; line-height:1.55; color:var(--ink-dim); }

  .edge-nav{ position:absolute; top:0; bottom:0; width:46px; display:flex; align-items:center; z-index:6; pointer-events:none; }
  .edge-nav.left{ left:0; justify-content:flex-start; }
  .edge-nav.right{ right:0; justify-content:flex-end; }
  .edge-nav button{
    pointer-events:auto; width:38px; height:38px; border-radius:50%;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.85); border:1px solid rgba(184,118,60,0.30);
    color:var(--ink); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    cursor:pointer; backdrop-filter:blur(6px);
    transition:background .25s ease, color .25s ease;
  }
  .edge-nav.left button{ margin-left:6px; }
  .edge-nav.right button{ margin-right:6px; }
  .edge-nav button:hover{ background:var(--copper); color:#fff; }
  .edge-nav svg{ width:16px;height:16px; }

  .next-strip{
    position:fixed; left:0; right:0; bottom:0; z-index:7;
    max-width:var(--maxw); margin:0 auto;
    display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;
    padding:13px 16px calc(13px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom));
    background:linear-gradient(0deg, var(--bg) 60%, rgba(251,246,236,0));
  }
  .next-strip .side{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:7px; cursor:pointer; font-size:11px; color:var(--ink-dim); letter-spacing:0.03em; }
  .next-strip .side b{ color:var(--copper-deep); font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-weight:600; font-size:12.5px; }
  .next-strip .side.right{ flex-direction:row-reverse; text-align:right; }
  .next-strip svg{ width:13px;height:13px; color:var(--copper); }

  /* ============ ADMIN ============ */
  #view-admin-login, #view-admin{
    position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:50;
    max-width:var(--maxw); margin:0 auto;
    background:var(--bg);
    display:none;
  }
  #view-admin-login.open, #view-admin.open{ display:block; }

  .admin-login-card{
    max-width:340px; margin:18vh auto 0; padding:32px 26px;
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:var(--radius-lg);
    box-shadow:var(--shadow); text-align:center;
  }
  .admin-login-icon{ width:30px; height:30px; color:var(--copper-deep); margin-bottom:10px; }
  .admin-login-card h2{ font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-size:19px; margin:0 0 6px; color:var(--ink); }
  .admin-login-card p{ font-size:12.5px; color:var(--ink-dim); margin:0 0 16px; }
  .admin-login-card input{
    width:100%; padding:11px 13px; border-radius:10px; border:1px solid var(--line);
    background:var(--bg); color:var(--ink); font-size:14px; text-align:center;
  }
  .admin-login-error{ display:none; color:#A9432F; font-size:12px; margin-top:8px; }
  .admin-login-error.show{ display:block; }
  .admin-login-actions{ display:flex; gap:10px; margin-top:16px; }
  .admin-login-actions .admin-btn{ flex:1; }

  .admin-btn{
    border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:10px; padding:10px 14px;
    font-size:13px; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer;
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:6px;
    background:var(--panel); color:var(--ink);
  }
  .admin-btn svg{ width:14px;height:14px; }
  .admin-btn.primary{ background:var(--copper); border-color:var(--copper); color:#fff; }
  .admin-btn.ghost{ background:transparent; }
  .admin-btn.small{ padding:8px 11px; font-size:12px; }
  .admin-btn.danger{ color:#A9432F; border-color:rgba(169,67,47,0.35); }

  .admin-topbar{
    position:sticky; top:0; z-index:2;
    background:var(--bg); border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
    padding:16px 18px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;
  }
  .admin-topbar-title{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-weight:600; font-size:16px; color:var(--ink); }
  .admin-topbar-title .leaf-icon{ color:var(--copper); width:16px;height:16px; }
  .admin-topbar-actions{ display:flex; gap:8px; }

  .admin-body{ padding:18px; padding-bottom:60px; height:calc(100vh - 66px); overflow-y:auto; }
  .admin-section{ margin-bottom:26px; }
  .admin-section-head{ display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-bottom:10px; }
  .admin-section-head h3{ font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-size:15px; margin:0; color:var(--ink); }

  .admin-field{ margin-bottom:10px; }
  .admin-field label{ display:block; font-size:11px; color:var(--ink-dim); margin-bottom:4px; letter-spacing:0.02em; }
  .admin-field input, .admin-field textarea{
    width:100%; padding:9px 11px; border-radius:9px; border:1px solid var(--line);
    background:var(--panel); color:var(--ink); font-size:13px; font-family:inherit;
  }
  .admin-field textarea{ resize:vertical; min-height:52px; }
  .admin-saved-msg{ display:none; font-size:11.5px; color:var(--sage-deep); margin-top:6px; }
  .admin-saved-msg.show{ display:block; }


  .admin-list{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:8px; }
  .admin-row{
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:12px;
    padding:8px 10px;
  }
  .admin-row-thumb{ width:40px; height:40px; border-radius:9px; overflow:hidden; flex:none; background:var(--panel-soft); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; }
  .admin-row-thumb img{ width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; }
  .admin-row-thumb svg{ width:16px;height:16px; color:var(--copper-deep); opacity:0.5; }
  .admin-row-main{ flex:1; min-width:0; cursor:pointer; }
  .admin-row-main .name{ font-size:13.5px; font-weight:600; color:var(--ink); white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; }
  .admin-row-main .meta{ font-size:11px; color:var(--ink-dim); margin-top:1px; }
  .admin-row-actions{ display:flex; gap:4px; flex:none; }
  .admin-row-actions button{
    width:30px; height:30px; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid var(--line); background:var(--bg);
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; cursor:pointer; color:var(--ink);
  }
  .admin-row-actions button svg{ width:13px;height:13px; }
  .admin-row-actions button:hover{ background:var(--panel-soft); }

  #admin-modal{
    position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:60; display:none;
    background:rgba(46,36,25,0.45); backdrop-filter:blur(3px);
    align-items:flex-end; justify-content:center;
  }
  #admin-modal.open{ display:flex; }
  .admin-modal-card{
    width:100%; max-width:var(--maxw); max-height:88vh; overflow-y:auto;
    background:var(--bg); border-radius:22px 22px 0 0; padding:20px 18px calc(20px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom));
    box-shadow:0 -10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  }
  .admin-modal-card h3{ font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-size:17px; margin:0 0 14px; color:var(--ink); }
  .admin-modal-row{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:8px; }
  .admin-upload-row{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; margin-bottom:10px; }
  .admin-upload-preview{ width:56px; height:56px; border-radius:12px; overflow:hidden; background:var(--panel-soft); border:1px solid var(--line); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex:none; }
  .admin-upload-preview img{ width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; }
  .admin-upload-preview svg{ width:20px;height:20px; color:var(--copper-deep); opacity:0.5; }
  .admin-modal-actions{ display:flex; gap:10px; margin-top:16px; }
  .admin-modal-actions .admin-btn{ flex:1; }

  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    #view-category{ transition:none; }
    .cat-card, .icon-btn, .back-btn, .lang-menu, .lang-current svg{ transition:none; }
  }
</style>
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2/dist/umd/supabase.js"></script>
</head>
<body>

<svg style="display:none" aria-hidden="true">
  <symbol id="icon-leaf" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none">
    <path d="M24 4C13 9 7 18 9 30c1 7 6 11 12 12V20c0-3 1-5 3-7" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M24 4c11 5 17 14 15 26-1 7-6 11-12 12" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M21 16c2 1 3 2 3 4M30 24c-2 0-4 1-5 3M16 26c2-1 4-1 5 0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-pin" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M12 22s7-7.6 7-13a7 7 0 1 0-14 0c0 5.4 7 13 7 13Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <circle cx="12" cy="9" r="2.4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-whatsapp" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M4 20l1.4-4.2A8 8 0 1 1 8.3 19L4 20Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <path d="M8.6 8.8c.2-.6.7-.6 1.1-.6.3 0 .5 0 .7.5.3.6.9 2 1 2.1.1.2.1.4 0 .6-.2.3-.3.5-.5.7-.2.2-.4.4-.2.8.3.5 1.2 1.8 2.6 2.5 1 .5 1.3.4 1.5.2.2-.2.8-.9 1-1.2.2-.3.4-.3.7-.2.3.1 1.9.9 2.2 1.1.3.1.5.2.5.4 0 .2.1 1.3-.5 2-1.2 1.3-3.5 1-5.9-.5-2-1.3-3.6-3.4-4-4-.3-.5-1-1.4-1.1-2.6 0-.7.1-1.2.4-1.6Z" fill="currentColor"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-share" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <circle cx="18" cy="5" r="2.4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <circle cx="6" cy="12" r="2.4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <circle cx="18" cy="19" r="2.4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <path d="M8.2 10.8 15.8 6.6M8.2 13.2l7.6 4.2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-instagram" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <rect x="3.5" y="3.5" width="17" height="17" rx="5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4.2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <circle cx="17" cy="7" r="1.1" fill="currentColor"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-back" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M14.5 18 8 12l6.5-6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-chevL" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M14.5 18 8 12l6.5-6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-chevR" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M9.5 6 16 12l-6.5 6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-chevDown" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M6 9l6 6 6-6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-gear" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <path d="M12 3v2.2M12 18.8V21M21 12h-2.2M5.2 12H3M18.4 5.6l-1.55 1.55M7.15 16.85l-1.55 1.55M18.4 18.4l-1.55-1.55M7.15 7.15 5.6 5.6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-edit" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M4 20h4l11-11-4-4L4 16v4Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <path d="M13.5 6.5l4 4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-trash" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M5 7h14M9 7V5a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h4a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v2m-9 0 1 13a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h8a1 1 0 0 0 1-1l1-13" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-plus" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-up" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M6 14.5 12 8l6 6.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-down" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M6 9.5 12 16l6-6.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-download" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M12 4v11m0 0 4-4m-4 4-4-4M5 19.5h14" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-close" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M6 6l12 12M18 6 6 18" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-image" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <rect x="3.5" y="4.5" width="17" height="15" rx="2.4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <circle cx="8.5" cy="9.5" r="1.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4"/>
    <path d="M5 17l5-5 3.5 3.5L17 12l3 3.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-lock" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <rect x="5.5" y="10.5" width="13" height="9" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <path d="M8 10.5V8a4 4 0 0 1 8 0v2.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
  </symbol>
</svg>

<div id="stage">

  <!-- ============ HOME VIEW ============ -->
  <div id="view-home">

    <div class="top-bar">
      <div class="brand-mark"><svg class="leaf-icon"><use href="#icon-leaf"/></svg> ÇINAR</div>

      <div class="top-bar-right">
        <div class="lang-switch" id="lang-switch">
          <button class="lang-current" id="lang-current-btn" onclick="toggleLangMenu()" aria-haspopup="listbox" aria-expanded="false">
            <span id="lang-current-code">TR</span>
            <svg><use href="#icon-chevDown"/></svg>
          </button>
          <div class="lang-menu" id="lang-menu" role="listbox">
            <button data-lang="tr" onclick="setLang('tr')">Türkçe</button>
            <button data-lang="en" onclick="setLang('en')">English</button>
            <button data-lang="de" onclick="setLang('de')">Deutsch</button>
            <button data-lang="ar" onclick="setLang('ar')">العربية</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="hero" id="hero-bg">
      <svg class="hero-watermark" viewBox="0 0 48 48"><use href="#icon-leaf"/></svg>
      <div class="hero-content">
        <h1 class="hero-title">ÇINAR</h1>
        <div class="hero-sub" id="t-subtitle">CAFE &amp; RESTORAN</div>
        <div class="hero-tag" id="t-tag">Gölgesinde nesiller buluşur</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="action-row">
      <a class="icon-btn" id="btn-map" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Konum"><svg><use href="#icon-pin"/></svg></a>
      <a class="icon-btn" id="btn-whatsapp" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="WhatsApp"><svg><use href="#icon-whatsapp"/></svg></a>
      <a class="icon-btn" id="btn-share" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Instagram"><svg><use href="#icon-instagram"/></svg></a>
    </div>

    <div class="section-head">
      <span class="eyebrow" id="t-eyebrow1">ÇINAR'DAN</span>
      <h2 id="t-menucats">Menü Kategorileri</h2>
      <div class="divider-leaf"><span class="line"></span><svg class="leaf-icon"><use href="#icon-leaf"/></svg><span class="line"></span></div>
    </div>

    <div class="cat-grid" id="cat-grid"></div>

    <div class="home-footer">
      <span>Midyat</span>
      <svg class="leaf-icon" id="footer-leaf-trigger" onclick="footerLeafTap()"><use href="#icon-leaf"/></svg>
      <span id="t-footertag">Çok dilli dijital menü</span>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- ============ CATEGORY VIEW ============ -->
  <div id="view-category" aria-hidden="true">

    <div class="cat-header" id="cat-header-bg">
      <div class="cat-header-row">
        <button class="back-btn" onclick="goHome()">
          <svg><use href="#icon-back"/></svg>
          <span id="t-menuword">Menü</span>
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="cat-title-wrap">
        <span class="eyebrow" id="cat-eyebrow">KATEGORİ</span>
        <h1 id="cat-title">—</h1>
        <div class="cat-count" id="cat-count"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="edge-nav left">
      <button onclick="navigate(-1)" aria-label="Önceki kategori"><svg><use href="#icon-chevL"/></svg></button>
    </div>
    <div class="edge-nav right">
      <button onclick="navigate(1)" aria-label="Sonraki kategori"><svg><use href="#icon-chevR"/></svg></button>
    </div>

    <div class="cat-body" id="cat-body"></div>

    <div class="next-strip">
      <div class="side left" onclick="navigate(-1)">
        <svg><use href="#icon-chevL"/></svg>
        <span><b id="prev-name">—</b></span>
      </div>
      <div class="side right" onclick="navigate(1)">
        <span><b id="next-name">—</b></span>
        <svg><use href="#icon-chevR"/></svg>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- ============ ADMIN LOGIN ============ -->
  <div id="view-admin-login" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="admin-login-card">
      <svg class="admin-login-icon"><use href="#icon-lock"/></svg>
      <h2>Yönetim Paneli</h2>
      <p>Menüyü düzenlemek için şifreyi girin.</p>
      <input type="password" id="admin-password-input" placeholder="Şifre" autocomplete="off" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter') submitAdminLogin()">
      <div class="admin-login-error" id="admin-login-error">Şifre yanlış, tekrar dene.</div>
      <div class="admin-login-actions">
        <button class="admin-btn ghost" onclick="closeAdminLogin()">Vazgeç</button>
        <button class="admin-btn primary" onclick="submitAdminLogin()">Giriş Yap</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ============ ADMIN PANEL ============ -->
  <div id="view-admin" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="admin-topbar">
      <div class="admin-topbar-title"><svg class="leaf-icon"><use href="#icon-leaf"/></svg> Yönetim Paneli</div>
      <div class="admin-topbar-actions">
<button class="admin-btn ghost small" onclick="exitAdmin()"><svg><use href="#icon-close"/></svg> Çıkış</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="admin-body">

      <div class="admin-section" id="admin-section-settings">
        <div class="admin-section-head">
          <h3>Genel Ayarlar</h3>
        </div>
        <div class="admin-field"><label>WhatsApp Numarası (90 ile, boşluksuz)</label><input type="text" id="admin-input-phone"></div>
        <div class="admin-field"><label>Google Maps Bağlantısı</label><input type="text" id="admin-input-maps"></div>
        <div class="admin-field"><label>Instagram Bağlantısı</label><input type="text" id="admin-input-instagram"></div>
        <button class="admin-btn primary small" onclick="saveAdminSettings()">Ayarları Kaydet</button>
        <div class="admin-saved-msg" id="admin-settings-saved">Kaydedildi.</div>

      </div>

      <div class="admin-section">
        <div class="admin-section-head">
          <h3>Kategoriler</h3>
          <button class="admin-btn primary small" onclick="openCategoryForm(null)"><svg><use href="#icon-plus"/></svg> Yeni Kategori</button>
        </div>
        <div class="admin-list" id="admin-category-list"></div>
      </div>

      <div class="admin-section" id="admin-items-section" style="display:none;">
        <div class="admin-section-head">
          <h3 id="admin-items-title">Ürünler</h3>
          <button class="admin-btn primary small" onclick="openItemForm(null)"><svg><use href="#icon-plus"/></svg> Yeni Ürün</button>
        </div>
        <div class="admin-list" id="admin-item-list"></div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ============ ADMIN EDIT MODAL ============ -->
  <div id="admin-modal" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="admin-modal-card" id="admin-modal-card"></div>
  </div>

</div>


</head>
<body>

<svg style="display:none" aria-hidden="true">
  <symbol id="icon-leaf" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none">
    <path d="M24 4C13 9 7 18 9 30c1 7 6 11 12 12V20c0-3 1-5 3-7" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M24 4c11 5 17 14 15 26-1 7-6 11-12 12" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M21 16c2 1 3 2 3 4M30 24c-2 0-4 1-5 3M16 26c2-1 4-1 5 0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-pin" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">

    <circle cx="12" cy="9" r="2.4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-whatsapp" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M4 20l1.4-4.2A8 8 0 1 1 8.3 19L4 20Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <path d="M8.6 8.8c.2-.6.7-.6 1.1-.6.3 0 .5 0 .7.5.3.6.9 2 1 2.1.1.2.1.4 0 .6-.2.3-.3.5-.5.7-.2.2-.4.4-.2.8.3.5 1.2 1.8 2.6 2.5 1 .5 1.3.4 1.5.2.2-.2.8-.9 1-1.2.2-.3.4-.3.7-.2.3.1 1.9.9 2.2 1.1.3.1.5.2.5.4 0 .2.1 1.3-.5 2-1.2 1.3-3.5 1-5.9-.5-2-1.3-3.6-3.4-4-4-.3-.5-1-1.4-1.1-2.6 0-.7.1-1.2.4-1.6Z" fill="currentColor"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-share" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <circle cx="18" cy="5" r="2.4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <circle cx="6" cy="12" r="2.4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <circle cx="18" cy="19" r="2.4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <path d="M8.2 10.8 15.8 6.6M8.2 13.2l7.6 4.2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-instagram" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <rect x="3.5" y="3.5" width="17" height="17" rx="5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4.2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <circle cx="17" cy="7" r="1.1" fill="currentColor"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-back" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M14.5 18 8 12l6.5-6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-chevL" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M14.5 18 8 12l6.5-6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-chevR" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M9.5 6 16 12l-6.5 6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-chevDown" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M6 9l6 6 6-6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-gear" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <path d="M12 3v2.2M12 18.8V21M21 12h-2.2M5.2 12H3M18.4 5.6l-1.55 1.55M7.15 16.85l-1.55 1.55M18.4 18.4l-1.55-1.55M7.15 7.15 5.6 5.6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-edit" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M4 20h4l11-11-4-4L4 16v4Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <path d="M13.5 6.5l4 4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-trash" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M5 7h14M9 7V5a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h4a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v2m-9 0 1 13a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h8a1 1 0 0 0 1-1l1-13" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-plus" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-up" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M6 14.5 12 8l6 6.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-down" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M6 9.5 12 16l6-6.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-download" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M12 4v11m0 0 4-4m-4 4-4-4M5 19.5h14" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-close" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <path d="M6 6l12 12M18 6 6 18" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-image" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <rect x="3.5" y="4.5" width="17" height="15" rx="2.4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <circle cx="8.5" cy="9.5" r="1.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4"/>
    <path d="M5 17l5-5 3.5 3.5L17 12l3 3.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>
  <symbol id="icon-lock" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    <rect x="5.5" y="10.5" width="13" height="9" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <path d="M8 10.5V8a4 4 0 0 1 8 0v2.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
  </symbol>
</svg>

<div id="stage">

  <!-- ============ HOME VIEW ============ -->
  <div id="view-home">

    <div class="top-bar">
      <div class="brand-mark"><svg class="leaf-icon"><use href="#icon-leaf"/></svg> ÇINAR</div>

            <button data-lang="tr" onclick="setLang('tr')">Türkçe</button>

            <button data-lang="de" onclick="setLang('de')">Deutsch</button>
            <button data-lang="ar" onclick="setLang('ar')">العربية</button>
          </div>
        </div>

    </div>

    <div class="hero" id="hero-bg">
      <svg class="hero-watermark" viewBox="0 0 48 48"><use href="#icon-leaf"/></svg>
      <div class="hero-content">
        <h1 class="hero-title">ÇINAR</h1>
        <div class="hero-sub" id="t-subtitle">CAFE &amp; RESTORAN</div>
        <div class="hero-tag" id="t-tag">Gölgesinde nesiller buluşur</div>

    </div>

    <div class="action-row">
      <a class="icon-btn" id="btn-map" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Konum"><svg><use href="#icon-pin"/></svg></a>
      <a class="icon-btn" id="btn-whatsapp" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="WhatsApp"><svg><use href="#icon-whatsapp"/></svg></a>
      <a class="icon-btn" id="btn-share" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Instagram"><svg><use href="#icon-instagram"/></svg></a>
    </div>

    <div class="section-head">
      <span class="eyebrow" id="t-eyebrow1">ÇINAR'DAN</span>
      <h2 id="t-menucats">Menü Kategorileri</h2>
      <div class="divider-leaf"><span class="line"></span><svg class="leaf-icon"><use href="#icon-leaf"/></svg><span class="line"></span></div>
    </div>

    <div class="cat-grid" id="cat-grid"></div>

    <div class="home-footer">

      <span id="t-footertag">Çok dilli dijital menü</span>

  </div>

  <!-- ============ CATEGORY VIEW ============ -->

    <div class="cat-header" id="cat-header-bg">
      <div class="cat-header-row">
        <button class="back-btn" onclick="goHome()">
          <svg><use href="#icon-back"/></svg>
          <span id="t-menuword">Menü</span>
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="cat-title-wrap">
        <span class="eyebrow" id="cat-eyebrow">KATEGORİ</span>
        <h1 id="cat-title">—</h1>
        <div class="cat-count" id="cat-count"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="edge-nav left">
      <button onclick="navigate(-1)" aria-label="Önceki kategori"><svg><use href="#icon-chevL"/></svg></button>

    <div class="edge-nav right">
      <button onclick="navigate(1)" aria-label="Sonraki kategori"><svg><use href="#icon-chevR"/></svg></button>
    </div>

    <div class="cat-body" id="cat-body"></div>

  <div id="view-admin-login" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="admin-login-card">
      <svg class="admin-login-icon"><use href="#icon-lock"/></svg>
      <h2>Yönetim Paneli</h2>
      <p>Menüyü düzenlemek için şifreyi girin.</p>
      <input type="password" id="admin-password-input" placeholder="Şifre" autocomplete="off" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter') submitAdminLogin()">
      <div class="admin-login-error" id="admin-login-error">Şifre yanlış, tekrar dene.</div>
      <div class="admin-login-actions">
        <button class="admin-btn ghost" onclick="closeAdminLogin()">Vazgeç</button>
        <button class="admin-btn primary" onclick="submitAdminLogin()">Giriş Yap</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ============ ADMIN PANEL ============ -->
  <div id="view-admin" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="admin-topbar">
      <div class="admin-topbar-title"><svg class="leaf-icon"><use href="#icon-leaf"/></svg> Yönetim Paneli</div>
      <div class="admin-topbar-actions">
<button class="admin-btn ghost small" onclick="exitAdmin()"><svg><use href="#icon-close"/></svg> Çıkış</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="admin-body">

      <div class="admin-section" id="admin-section-settings">
        <div class="admin-section-head">
          <h3>Genel Ayarlar</h3>
        </div>
        <div class="admin-field"><label>WhatsApp Numarası (90 ile, boşluksuz)</label><input type="text" id="admin-input-phone"></div>
        <div class="admin-field"><label>Google Maps Bağlantısı</label><input type="text" id="admin-input-maps"></div>
        <div class="admin-field"><label>Instagram Bağlantısı</label><input type="text" id="admin-input-instagram"></div>
        <button class="admin-btn primary small" onclick="saveAdminSettings()">Ayarları Kaydet</button>
        <div class="admin-saved-msg" id="admin-settings-saved">Kaydedildi.</div>

      </div>

      <div class="admin-section">
        <div class="admin-section-head">
          <h3>Kategoriler</h3>
          <button class="admin-btn primary small" onclick="openCategoryForm(null)"><svg><use href="#icon-plus"/></svg> Yeni Kategori</button>
        </div>
        <div class="admin-list" id="admin-category-list"></div>
      </div>

      <div class="admin-section" id="admin-items-section" style="display:none;">
        <div class="admin-section-head">
          <h3 id="admin-items-title">Ürünler</h3>
          <button class="admin-btn primary small" onclick="openItemForm(null)"><svg><use href="#icon-plus"/></svg> Yeni Ürün</button>
        </div>
        <div class="admin-list" id="admin-item-list"></div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ============ ADMIN EDIT MODAL ============ -->
  <div id="admin-modal" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="admin-modal-card" id="admin-modal-card"></div>
  </div>

</div>
